sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1287" key="a)dia/lektos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδιά-λεκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1287.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without conversation</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βίος</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">solitary</tr_> life, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
